subcodes.first_line: Concerning the forty yards and the missives which were sent, all are in accordance with the handwriting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در باره ٤٠ واری و سفیدهایمرسوله که مرقوم فرموده بودند جمیع مطابق دستخط عالم
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat]
